component.name: Simple Audio Sweeper
component.summary: Simple Audio Sweeper. A handy tool for DIY audio enthusiasts.

description.p: Simple Audio Sweeper generates any desired audio frequency and analyzes your audio system’s frequency response.

ul.li: Automatic and manual frequency spectrum sweep
Real-time FFT spectrum display with selectable FFT size and window function
8 independent spectrum buffers for result comparison
Export results to PNG or CSV
